_note: When adding a new vulnerability type not already in VulnType, see docs/benchmark-management.md#updating-when-you-add-a-new-vulnerability-type for the source files that need updating.
description: Small Express plugin installer service with shell-based package installation.

vulnerabilities.description: User-controlled plugin package data flows into child_process.spawn through a shell command.
The service is created with a plaintext HTTP server.
The plugin installation endpoint performs expensive command execution without rate limiting.
